forecast_diagnosis.interpretation: Nonnegative calibration correctly shut down models whose immediately prior calibration relation was nonpositive. This prevented fabricated activity but left the policy concentrated in January, with sparse June actions.

ai_uplift_diagnosis.conclusion: The six AI-research-assisted interactions changed model gain and point estimates but did not establish a statistically stable or drawdown-nondegrading edge. AI improvement is false.

critical_interpretation: Stateful carry can reduce repeated round-trip charges: the augmented long-short base replay returned 3.619876 percent while its matched independent-hourly comparator returned -4.733173 percent. This is an execution-conversion result, not alpha validation.
No candidate had a positive familywise 168-hour block-bootstrap lower bound, at least four positive months, or at least 90 active days.

The positive stress point estimates are not ordinary cost sensitivity. The frozen stress replay raises both the one-way charge and the transition hurdle, so it selects fewer positions than the base replay. Higher selectivity, not higher cost, explains the non-monotonic result.

The always-long fixed-sleeve comparator returned approximately -9.9 percent with 52.06 percent maximum drawdown, confirming an adverse and volatile evaluation regime but not excusing the models' weak information coefficients.

The local language models were useful for proposing factor families, but both proposer and critic failed deterministic syntax or financial-sign checks. No raw language-model output received execution authority.
decisions: Do not promote, leverage, testnet-run, or represent any Round 43 candidate as profitable.
Retain stateful position accounting as a research infrastructure improvement, but do not treat it as evidence of predictive edge.
Do not tune the cost hurdle against the consumed 2025 H1 outcomes.
Future cost stress must reprice one matched action ledger while keeping position decisions fixed; a separate selectivity ablation may vary the hurdle.
Do not add more unconstrained language-model factors. Any next AI factor must use the bounded program workflow and beat a matched ML-only policy under block-bootstrap and drawdown gates.
next_model_requirements: Target the forecasting defect rather than another threshold or meta-label adjustment.
Pre-register a regime-explicit or multi-horizon economic target with a matched fixed-action cost stress and causal walk-forward roles.
Require stable forecast association and nonzero calibrated amplitude across multiple months before portfolio replay.
Use short development slices only for implementation viability, then freeze before any full consumed-window comparison.
Keep BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, and SOLUSDT fixed one-third sleeves, unlevered, with the 24-hour maximum hold until an unlevered edge is established.
